Operation 'get_/respondents/{respondentId}/responses' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is awkwardly phrased with 'in a human readable way'. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about what the operation returns, required parameters, and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: retrieve responses associated to a respondent in a human readable way
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all survey responses submitted by a specific respondent in a human-readable format. Requires the respondent ID as a path parameter. Returns an array of response objects containing question IDs, answer values, and metadata. Useful for viewing individual respondent data or exporting responses for analysis.
data.reasoning: Original summary is awkwardly phrased with 'in a human readable way'. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about what the operation returns, required parameters, and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'get_/reports/{reportId}' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'report details' is too generic and doesn't indicate action. Description is missing entirely. Added context about what constitutes a report, required parameters, expected return data, and use cases for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve survey report details and analytics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information and analytics for a specific survey report. Requires the report ID as a path parameter. Returns report metadata including title, creation date, survey reference, and aggregated analytics data. This operation is useful for accessing pre-generated survey analysis and summary statistics.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'report details' is too generic and doesn't indicate action. Description is missing entirely. Added context about what constitutes a report, required parameters, expected return data, and use cases for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'get_/webhooks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing, which limits AI agent understanding of return values and use cases. Added details about response structure and practical use cases.

data.current_summary: list all webhooks of a user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all webhooks configured for the authenticated user. Returns an array of webhook objects containing webhook ID, URL, event types, and configuration details. Use this operation to view all active webhook subscriptions and their settings.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing, which limits AI agent understanding of return values and use cases. Added details about response structure and practical use cases.

message: Operation 'post_/webhooks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about required request body structure, response format, and side effects (webhook becomes active immediately) to help AI agents understand what inputs are needed and what happens after invocation.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription for the authenticated user. Requires a request body with webhook configuration including URL endpoint and event types to subscribe to. Returns the created webhook object with ID and configuration details. The webhook will begin receiving event notifications immediately upon successful creation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about required request body structure, response format, and side effects (webhook becomes active immediately) to help AI agents understand what inputs are needed and what happens after invocation.

message: Operation 'get_/webhooks/{webhookId}' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Both summary and description are completely missing.
